title: Paravaiye Engu Irukkiraai Song Lyrics Kattradhu Thamizh
stanzas:
Paravaiye Engu Irukkiraai Song Lyrics Kattradhu Thamizh
#Yuvan #NaMuthukumar

Paravaye engu irukkiraai
parakkave ennai alaikiraai
thadaiyangal thaedi
varugiren, anbae. (2)

paarkkum dhisaigal ellaam
paavai mugam varudhe
meengal kaanalin neeril
therivadhundo
kangal poigal solvadhundo

nee poata kadithathin
varigal kadalaaga
adhil midhanthene penne
naanum padagaaga.

Paravaye engu irukkiraai
parakkave ennai alaikiraai
thadaiyangal thaedi
varugiren, anbae.

kadhai pesik kondu
vaa kaatrodu povom
ooraiyaadal theernthalum
un mounangal podhum

indha pul poondum
paravai naamum podhaatha?
ini boologam muzhudhum
azhagaai pogaathaa?

mudhal murai
vazha pudikkudhe
mudhal murai
velicham pirakkudhe
mudhal murai
murindha kilai ondru
pookkudhe.

mudhal murai
kadhavu thirakkudhe
mudhal murai
kaatru varuguthe
mudha murai
kanavu pazhikkuthe
anbae.

idho idho indha
payanathilae
idhu podhum kanmani
verenna naanum kaetpen

indha nigazhgaalam
ippadiye thaan thodaraathaa
en thaniyaana payanangal
indrudan mudiyaadhaa ?

mudhal murai
vazha pudikkudhe
mudhal murai
velicham pirakkudhe
mudhal murai
murindha kilai ondru
pookkudhe.

mudhal murai
kadhavu thirakkudhe
mudhal murai
kaatru varuguthe
mudha murai
kanavu pazhikkuthe
anbae.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of longing and searching for one's place in the world, reflecting deep emotional themes.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Kattradhu Thamizh, the song underscores the protagonist's journey of self-discovery and emotional turmoil.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

Paravaiye Engu Irukkiraai was released on October 5, 2007.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Paravaiye Engu Irukkiraai, the protagonist grapples with feelings of isolation and a quest for belonging. The song's melancholic tone beautifully encapsulates the emotional struggles faced throughout Kattradhu Thamizh. With poignant lyrics by Na Muthukumar, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and reflection. The haunting melody, brought to life by Ilaiyaraaja's soulful voice, resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced longing.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paravaiye Engu Irukkiraai from Kattradhu Thamizh is a hauntingly beautiful melody that resonates with the soul. With Ilaiyaraaja's mesmerizing vocals and Yuvan's masterful composition, this song captures the essence of longing and introspection. Dive into a world of emotions as the lyrics unfold a poignant narrative that stays with you long after the music fades.
stanzaMeanings: Where are you, my bird? I am searching for the obstacles that are stopping me from flying, my dear. (2)
This is the place where my earth begins, isn't it?
This is the place where my path exists, isn't it?
All the directions I see are like the face of a goddess; is there a way to reveal the fish in the water or to speak of the eyes?
The words of the letter you left behind are like a sea; I too am a part of it, my dear.
Where are you, my bird? I am searching for the obstacles that are stopping me from flying, my dear.
The path I am taking with you seems like a blue sky, like a bond that connects us.
Come, let’s talk about the story and go; even if the town is finished, your silence is enough.
Are we not the birds that fly together? Will the whole world not become beautiful?
The first time, I learned to live; the first time, light was born; the first time, a flower bloomed from a broken bud.
The first time, the door opens; the first time, the wind comes; the first time, dreams are fulfilled, my dear.
In the love of the mountains, a river flows.
On this earth, we will flow like a river without a burden.
Here, here in this journey, this is enough, my dear; what else should I ask?
Even if I am separated, I will always live in this moment.
Will these paths continue like this? Will my unique journeys never end?
The first time, I learned to live; the first time, light was born; the first time, a flower bloomed from a broken bud.
The first time, the door opens; the first time, the wind comes; the first time, dreams are fulfilled, my dear.
